reflection.candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows directional agreement but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the signal as unvalidated and freeze new entries on that pair regardless of conviction score.
reflection.mechanism: green_matches counts times the current live indicator fingerprint historically matched a WINNING configuration; zero matches means the present state has no precedent in the profitable memory bank — conviction% is measuring instantaneous agreement, not forward edge, so acting on it is trading a pattern the system has never won on.
reflection.testable_rule: if consensus_dir != 'NEUTRAL' and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: return ConsensusVeto()  # require green_matches >= 1 before sizing on 30-indicator direction

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
